label: Data augmentation & synthetic-data generation

node.label: Data augmentation & synthetic-data generation
node.definition: Data augmentation and synthetic-data generation expand training variation through transformations, simulation, model generation, or controlled perturbation.
node.why_it_matters: In this atlas graph, Data augmentation & synthetic-data generation is modeled as depending on Datasets, sampling & splits, Multimodal, simulated & streaming data and feeding downstream nodes such as Robustness, distribution shift & OOD evaluation, Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR), Domain randomization & simulation curricula.
examples: atlas downstream link to Robustness, distribution shift & OOD evaluation
atlas downstream link to Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR)
atlas downstream link to Domain randomization & simulation curricula
limitations: Results are sensitive to data quality, hyperparameters, compute budget, random variation, and evaluation contamination. Its direct dependencies include Datasets, sampling & splits, Multimodal, simulated & streaming data.
